sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented for this shmup title

special_mechanics.name: 8-Direction Movement & Firing
special_mechanics.description: Player character can move in 8 directions through space. Firing direction is independent from movement direction. Holding down fire button locks the firing direction.

special_mechanics.name: Floating Movement
special_mechanics.description: Player floats through space rather than walking/running. Game is a shoot 'em up with automatic sidescrolling in cardinal directions.

special_mechanics.name: Screen-Following Requirement
special_mechanics.description: Screen scrolls automatically in cardinal directions and changes direction mid-level. Player must keep up or dies from screen edge contact.

special_mechanics.name: Secret Room Transitions
special_mechanics.description: Gaps at screen edges can be entered with precise timing to access secret rooms and change screen orientation.

tier_notes: Tier 3 - Empirical/Qualitative only. Source is Wikipedia gameplay overview. No technical movement parameters, gravity values, jump physics, or sub-pixel data documented. Game is a shmup (shoot 'em up) with floating movement mechanics, not a platformer with jump physics. Movement occurs in 8 directions in space-based environment.
